message: Aldric the Ironclad: "Welcome to the Iron Hall, traveler. Our halls are forge-lit and ringing with the clatter of training swords. Strength of arm, courage in battle, and the iron will to endure."

replies.text: I wish to join the Iron Hall.
Master, I am ready to be tested for the rank of Apprentice.
Master, I am ready to be tested for the rank of Adept.
Master, I am ready to be tested for the rank of Journeyman.
Master, I am ready to be tested for the rank of Veteran.
Master, I am ready to be tested for the rank of Elder.
Master, I am ready to be tested for the rank of Grandmaster.
I am ready for the master trial of the Iron Hall.
I have walked the master's path and returned.
Tell me about the Iron Hall.

message: "The Iron Hall has stood for many lives of men. We take in those who would learn our craft, train them through seven trials, and elevate the few who endure to master rank. Each trial requires a tribute — gold, sweat, and patience. Speak again when you are ready."
"You wish to join the Iron Hall? Good. Initiation is free — but know that every trial after this one will demand tribute. Kneel, take the oath, and rise as an Initiate."
"You are raised to the rank of Initiate. Train, travel, gather what you need, and return when you are ready for the next trial."
"To be raised to Apprentice you must offer a tribute of 50 gold. The coin is symbolic — it goes to the upkeep of these halls and to the widows of those who fell here. Are you prepared?"
"You are raised to the rank of Apprentice. Train, travel, gather what you need, and return when you are ready for the next trial."
"To be raised to Adept you must offer a tribute of 200 gold. The coin is symbolic — it goes to the upkeep of these halls and to the widows of those who fell here. Are you prepared?"
"You are raised to the rank of Adept. Train, travel, gather what you need, and return when you are ready for the next trial."
"To be raised to Journeyman you must offer a tribute of 500 gold. The coin is symbolic — it goes to the upkeep of these halls and to the widows of those who fell here. Are you prepared?"
"You are raised to the rank of Journeyman. Train, travel, gather what you need, and return when you are ready for the next trial."
"To be raised to Veteran you must offer a tribute of 1500 gold. The coin is symbolic — it goes to the upkeep of these halls and to the widows of those who fell here. Are you prepared?"
"You are raised to the rank of Veteran. Train, travel, gather what you need, and return when you are ready for the next trial."
"To be raised to Elder you must offer a tribute of 5000 gold. The coin is symbolic — it goes to the upkeep of these halls and to the widows of those who fell here. Are you prepared?"
"You are raised to the rank of Elder. Train, travel, gather what you need, and return when you are ready for the next trial."
"To be raised to Grandmaster you must offer a tribute of 15000 gold. The coin is symbolic — it goes to the upkeep of these halls and to the widows of those who fell here. Are you prepared?"

"You are raised to the rank of Grandmaster. Few who walk through our doors reach this rank. There is one trial left — the master trial — but it is not a trial of strength. Speak to me again when you are ready to begin it."

"The master trial is not fought; it is endured. Walk the world for a season. Touch the places that frighten you. When you return, bring with you 50000 gold as the final tribute, and I will know whether the Iron Hall has truly entered your bones."
"You have walked the path and you have returned. Lay down the tribute, and take this — the Tome of the Iron Hall. From this day, you are one of us in name as you have long been in deed."
"Welcome home, master. The halls are yours."
Vespera the Quiet: "Welcome to the Shadow Lodge, traveler. Our halls are low-ceilinged and lit only by tallow candles. Coin moves in the shadows, and so do those who know its weight."

Father Caelan: "Welcome to the Sun Sanctum, traveler. Our halls are bright with stained-glass dawn light. Mercy is a discipline. So is judgement."

Mother Briar: "Welcome to the Verdant Circle, traveler. Our halls are open to the sky, ringed by living oak. The wild remembers all who walked through it. Walk gently."

Magister Vorell: "Welcome to the Arcanum Spire, traveler. Our halls are glass-floored, lit by hovering motes of cold blue fire. Knowledge is the only weapon that grows sharper with use."
